enrichment.summary: Kyle takes his first self-administered biweekly oral history test covering random decades in BC history, using a random number generator to pick time periods and giving himself roughly one minute per answer. He openly acknowledges being underprepared and repeatedly struggles to stay awake throughout the hour-long session.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: admits he did not study before doing the test and needs to study more
must be fully caffeinated before doing these tests or he falls asleep
believes grading himself and knowing what he doesn't know will help him improve
acknowledges he did poorly but is glad he didn't get a zero
